title: Spontex 3 Microfibre Collection Pads Cleaning Cloths Extra Absorbent 17.5 x 20cm
features: Multipurpose for wet and dry use; 100% plastic free packaging
description: Product Description Spontex Microfibre Collection Pads are super resistant and extra absorbent thanks to their special sponge centre. These multipurpose pads are very efficient even without detergent removing dirt, grease, bacteria and even viruses* with just water.​ Pad size: 17.5 x 20cm. Composition: 85% polyester, 15% polyamide. Assorted colours, mixed pack. Did you know? Spontex Microfibre pads are made up of thousands of tiny fibres, so the number of contact points with the surface is greatly increased compared to non microfibre cloths. This means that each cloth has extraordinary cleaning power that eliminates 99% of bacteria and viruses*. Spontex Microfibre pads can be used with just water to clean efficiently and achieve sparkling results, there's no need to use cleaning detergents which may pollute streams and rivers. They are also super resistant and long lasting. They can be washed in the washing machine not once, but up to 500 times, so you can keep using your pads over and over again. When they are no longer fit for their intended use why not find them a new purpose like cleaning shoes or wiping down your bins. As part of their commitment to switch to more sustainable packaging, Spontex no longer use any plastic packaging on this product. They have moved to a fully recyclable cardboard sleeve which means they are using 560kg less plastic for every 100,000 packs. Top Tip: These extra absorbent pads come in a variety of colours so why not use a specific colour pad for a specific task or room all around the house. * Removes 99% of E. Coli bacteria from glass surfaces and human coronavirus from tiled surfaces with water only. Tested by an independent laboratory.​ Safety Warning To avoid suffocation, please keep the wrapper away from babies and small children. Manufacturer Contact Information Mapa Spontex UK Ltd, Berkeley Business Park, Worcester, WR4 9ZS, UK. See more
